gold.title: Animated Check Box
gold.reason: Neon-glow checkbox with CSS animation on check — the glowing border effect is visually striking and makes a pricing or plan-selector feel premium and modern.

gold.title: Checkbox 02
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated card-style checkbox with label, description, and disabled state — a polished full-row selection pattern ideal for feature/plan selectors on pricing pages.

gold.title: Choicebox 1
gold.reason: Flexible ChoiceboxGroup supporting both radio and checkbox modes in row/column layouts with visual card styling — a premium choice-card component ready for plan or feature selection pages.

gold.title: Checkbox
gold.reason: CVA variant system with AnimatePresence Framer Motion on the indicator, multiple size/color variants — a polished, themeable checkbox that elevates any form.

gold.title: Radix Checkbox
gold.reason: Framer Motion animated check indicator on Radix primitive — smooth spring-driven check animation gives a tactile, premium feel.

gold.title: Radix Switch
gold.reason: Motion-animated switch with left/right/thumb icon slots on Radix Switch primitive — visually polished and functionally rich, great for settings or feature-toggle pages.

gold.title: Checkbox
gold.reason: SVG-drawn animated checkmark with configurable color, size, and animation duration via motion — a designer-level custom checkbox that works beautifully in any branded context.

gold.title: Checkbox 1
gold.reason: CSS-only peer-based custom checkbox with smooth scale/opacity transitions and a styled label — elegant minimal approach that looks distinctly better than a browser default.

silver.title: Custom Checkbox
silver.reason: Multiple style variants (default, gradient shadow, transformer, animate) using appearance-none and CSS — above-average visual variety though somewhat CSS-heavy.

silver.title: Checkbox
silver.reason: Neobrutalism-styled Radix checkbox with thick border and bold shadow — a distinctive design language that would suit bold/playful brand pages.

silver.title: Animate Checkbox
silver.reason: Framer Motion animated indicator on Radix CheckboxPrimitive with controlled/uncontrolled state — clean animation, solid implementation.

silver.title: Checkbox 1
silver.reason: CVA-powered variant checkbox with size variants and indeterminate state via Minus icon — well-structured, type-safe, above shadcn baseline.

silver.title: Checkbox
silver.reason: CVA variants with group peer styling and Check/Minus icons — clean, variant-rich checkbox with good TypeScript hygiene.

silver.title: Checkbox [react-aria-components]
silver.reason: Accessible react-aria Checkbox and CheckboxGroup with proper validation and Text slots — solid accessible implementation.

silver.title: Checkbox 1
silver.reason: React-aria-components checkbox with CheckboxGroup and validation — accessible, well-typed, clean.

silver.title: Checkbox
silver.reason: Enhanced Radix checkbox with improved cn styling — a step above the bare shadcn default with cleaner focus/checked states.

silver.title: Checkbox Group
silver.reason: Base-UI CheckboxGroup styled wrapper with indeterminate and nested group support — functional group component with meaningful accessibility additions.

silver.title: Checkbox Group 1
silver.reason: Base-UI CheckboxGroup with defaultValue and flex layout — accessible primitive, clean minimal styling.

silver.title: Checkbox 1
silver.reason: Ark-UI Checkbox with data-state checked/hover styling — accessible component from a solid primitive library.

silver.title: Checkbox Group 1
silver.reason: Subframe checkbox group with SubframeUtils helpers — structured group pattern, though tied to Subframe ecosystem.

bronze.title: Checkbox 1
bronze.reason: Bare shadcn Checkbox import with a Label — the absolute minimum wrapper, no visual upgrade.

bronze.title: Checkbox 1
bronze.reason: Subframe internal checkbox — not portable outside the Subframe ecosystem.

bronze.title: Grid List [react-aria-components]
bronze.reason: A grid list with drag handles and selection — technically uses Checkbox but is primarily a data-list component, not a checkbox component.

bronze.title: List Box
bronze.reason: A react-aria ListBox — a selection list primitive, not a checkbox. Misclassified in the checkbox folder.

bronze.title: Checkbox Group
bronze.reason: Placeholder stub with a counter — not a real implementation.

bronze.title: Ruixen Table Basic
bronze.reason: A data table that uses Checkbox for row selection — this is a table component, not a checkbox. Wrong category entirely.

bronze.title: Checkbox
bronze.reason: The raw shadcn base Checkbox — the baseline with no visual additions.

bronze.title: Checkbox
bronze.reason: Basic custom checkbox with class conditionals and no animation — functional but no visual differentiation.
